title: Earnings Preview: SolarEdge Technologies (SEDG) Q2 Earnings Expected to Decline
text: SolarEdge Technologies (SEDG) Q2 2024 Earnings Preview. Analyst Expectations: Wall Street anticipates disappointing results for SEDG's second quarter ending June 2024. EPS Forecast: Loss of 1.56 per share, representing a -159.5% year-over-year decline. Revenue Projection: 258.19 million, down 74% from the prior year quarter. Release Date: August 7, 2024. Key Analytical Factors: Estimate Revisions: The consensus EPS estimate for the quarter has been revised 5.72% lower over the last 30 days, reflecting analyst reassessments of business conditions. Earnings Surprise Prediction: The Zacks Earnings ESP stands at +5.13%, indicating analysts have become somewhat more bullish recently. However, this positive signal is undermined by SEDG's Zacks Rank of #4, making it difficult to conclusively predict an earnings beat. Historical Context: The photovoltaic products manufacturer missed expectations in the prior quarter, posting a 1.90 loss instead of the anticipated 1.58, delivering a -20.25% surprise. Over four quarters, SEDG has beaten estimates only twice. Bottom Line: The combination of positive ESP but weak ranking suggests investors should remain cautious about earnings beat prospects ahead of the August release.
